text: [FOR HIRE] Need a Discord bot developer urgently. I run a gaming community of 5,000+ members and need a bot with ticket systems, role assignment, and moderation features. Budget: $800-1500. Timeline: 2 weeks. DM me if interested.
author: u/gamingcommunity_owner
reasoning: Clear Discord bot request with explicit budget, specific requirements, and urgency — perfect fit.
outreach_angle: I specialize in Discord bots for gaming communities — I've built ticket systems, role management, and moderation tools for communities similar to yours. Happy to hop on a quick call to scope this out.

text: Ask HN: Our Zapier workflows are breaking constantly and costing us $300/month. Looking for someone to help us migrate everything to n8n or a custom solution. About 20 workflows across Slack, Airtable, and HubSpot.
author: user_hn
reasoning: Explicit automation pain point with budget context and specific tools — strong freelance signal.
outreach_angle: I've migrated several Zapier setups to n8n — I can audit your 20 workflows and give you a fixed-price quote for the migration. Most projects like this take 1-2 weeks.
